name: Libromancer Fire
name_jp: リブロマンサー・ファイア
desc: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Libromancer Fire". You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Fire" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Libromancer Fire". You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Fire" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Libromancer" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Libromancer Fire". You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Fire" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
